narrative.description: Taito's Dreamcast rail shooter casts the player as a squad leader defending Earth from an alien armada, combining first-person lock-on targeting with squad command prompts across cinematic invasion set pieces.
narrative.core_loop: Scan formations for weak points, lock onto targets, issue squad orders, and survive escalating waves until the stage boss is destroyed.

mechanics.map_notes: Enemy squadrons arrive in Space Invaders-style rows that the player must dismantle with lock-on bursts.
mechanics.expression: Enemy squadrons arrive in Space Invaders-style rows that the player must dismantle with lock-on bursts.

mechanics.map_notes: Campaign advances through discrete invasion sectors, each ending in a set-piece boss encounter.
mechanics.expression: Campaign advances through discrete invasion sectors, each ending in a set-piece boss encounter.

mechanics.map_notes: Lock-on reticle fires immediately once a target is acquired without charge delay.
mechanics.expression: Lock-on reticle fires immediately once a target is acquired without charge delay.

mechanics.map_notes: Squad health depletes from enemy fire; zero triggers mission failure.
mechanics.expression: Squad health depletes from enemy fire; zero triggers mission failure.

mechanics.map_notes: Alien craft emit readable bullet curtains the player weaves through while targeting.
mechanics.expression: Alien craft emit readable bullet curtains the player weaves through while targeting.

mechanics.map_notes: Stage bosses shift attack patterns after losing armor segments.
mechanics.expression: Stage bosses shift attack patterns after losing armor segments.

mechanics.map_notes: Large enemies wind up beam sweeps before firing.
mechanics.expression: Large enemies wind up beam sweeps before firing.

mechanics.map_notes: Limited continues restart the current sector from the beginning.
mechanics.expression: Limited continues restart the current sector from the beginning.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses cycle through learnable volley and dive patterns.
mechanics.expression: Bosses cycle through learnable volley and dive patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Free reticle movement independent of squad facing on rails.
mechanics.expression: Free reticle movement independent of squad facing on rails.

mechanics.map_notes: Some sectors offer mid-mission save points between wave groups.
mechanics.expression: Some sectors offer mid-mission save points between wave groups.

mechanics.map_notes: Debris fields and planetary obstacles constrain safe firing lanes.
mechanics.expression: Debris fields and planetary obstacles constrain safe firing lanes.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Space Raiders through its core shooter loop.
